titleStmt.title: SII 5.496: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 496. (A.R. No. 197 of 1894). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE. Ibid, Nos. 55 and 57.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvāykeḻvi muṉṉuṭaittāka śrīmatbhūdevitaprusya cāturvarṇṇakulotbhavasarvalokahitārthāya citrameḷasya śāsanam . Aṟam vaḷarak kaṟpamaiyap pukaḻ peruka maṉuneṟitaḻaippa niyāya naṭāttukiṉṟa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup peṭaināṭṭu viṣai yamāṉa muṇṭaināṭṭu viṣai yattomum perāttināṭṭu viṣai yattomum pakaṭaināṭṭu viṣai yattomum nāṭṭu viṣai yattomum tavāṭanāṭṭu viṣai yattomum
viṣai yattomuṅ kalāṟattaināṭṭu viṣai yattomu maṅkaṭaiyaccaḷukkināṭṭu viṣai yattomum pūṅkaināṭṭu viṣai yattomun toṅkaippūṅkaināṭṭu viṣai yattomuñcakalināṭṭu viṣaiyattomum pottappināṭṭu viṣaiyattomum Uṭpaṭṭa periyanāṭṭu viṣaiyattomum cakarayāṇṭu Āyirattorunūṟṟorupattoṉpatāl piṅkala saṁvatsara ttu maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaikoṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu pattoṉpatāvatu vṛści kanāyaṟṟup patiṉaintān tiyatiyāṉa veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum re vatiyum peṟṟa nāḷ Immaṇṭalattu nellūrāṉa vikkiramaciṅkapura
ttut tiruppāṟkaṭaṟ cittirameḻiviṇṇakariṟ cittirameḻimaṇṭapattuk kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi niṟaivaṟa niṟaintiruntu Iccittirameḻiviṇṇakaremperumāṉukku nāṅkaḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka vaittuk kuṭutta paricāvatu perūrāṉavai Āyiraṅ kuḻiyum naṭuvutarattu raḷakaṉ Eḻunūṟṟaimpatu kuḻiyuñ ciṟṟūrāṉavai Aiññūṟu kuḻiyum paḷḷippaṭṭukkaḷāṉavai Irunūṟṟaimpatu kuḻiyum nirnilattile viṭṭu nālumulaiyilun tiruvāḻiyuñ cittirameḻiyum Iṭṭa kal naṭṭuc cantirātittavarai cellakkaṭavatāka viṭakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi brāhmaṇi pura cevakappaṟṟu Eṉṉāte meḻipiṭit tuḻakkaṭavā rellārum viṭakkaṭavarākavum
Ippaṭi viṭātār periyanāṭṭārkkup piḻaittār paṭa Itu viṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Itu vilakkiṉār keṅkaikkaraik kurāṟpacuk kuttiṉāṉ pāpattai paṭakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vaittuk kuṭuttom periyanāṭṭu viṣaiyattom paṇiyāṟ cittirameḻiveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṭuvel viṣaiyaceṉāpati Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nellūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṟaṭṭappūṇṭip piraṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koṭuvarurveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uṭuvūr Ulakuyyakkoṇṭa cerit teciraṭṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āttakkūr comi raṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai mutipaṟuttuk kaṅkaikoṇṭā ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṇṭanārāyaṇapurattut tāmiraṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ko Uruppiraṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai veṅkūr comiraṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Allūr muppiraṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Allūr Ayittamiraṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai muṅkaḻūrp porāyirat teciraṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kumiḻūr Irācentiracoḻamuventaveḷā ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ceṟuvaṉūr tirukkāḷatti teciraṭṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṟumaṇaik kāṭṭināyakka ṉeḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai viriyūrc ciyappanāyaka ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku IvaiThis inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 5.496 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
